prestazioni: Engine swap to Ford Duratec 3.0L (AJ-V6) with a custom billet crankshaft from Manley Performance (forged internals) and Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (10.5:1 compression ratio), paired with a Garrett GT3582R turbocharger (18 psi boost) and a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust system by MagnaFlow (cat-back with 409S mandrel-bent tubing).

Full standalone ECU upgrade to a Haltech Elite 2500 with custom wiring harness by Painless Performance, integrated with a Bosch LSU 4.9 wideband O2 sensor and AEM X-Series digital gauges for real-time monitoring of AFR, boost, and oil pressure.

Suspension overhaul with KW Clubsport coilovers (adjustable damping and ride height) paired with Eibach Pro-Street S anti-roll bars (25mm front, 22mm rear) and polyurethane bushings from Energy Suspension (full set for subframes and control arms). Braking system upgraded to StopTech Big Brake Kit (4-piston calipers, 328mm rotors) with Ferodo DS2500 brake pads and Motul RBF 660 brake fluid.
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using a Rocket Bunny Tribute-specific kit (Pandem-style fenders, front/rear bumpers, and side skirts) with carbon fiber overfenders by Seibon for weight reduction. Rear diffuser by Varis Japan with integrated dual exhaust cutouts.

OEM+ aggressive front end styling with a custom carbon fiber hood by APR Performance (functional dual vents) and a Mazdaspeed3 lip spoiler (color-matched to body). Headlights replaced with Morimoto XB LED projectors with custom HID angel eyes and sequential turn signals.

Interior stripped and rebuilt with a full Recaro SRD-E bucket seat setup (fixed-back, FIA-approved) and a custom bolt-in roll cage by Custom Cages (8-point, TIG-welded chromoly). Steering wheel replaced with a NRG Innovations 350mm deep-dish wheel wrapped in Alcantara, paired with a quick-release hub. Shift knob upgraded to a weighted short-throw unit by B&M (for manual transmissions) or a custom paddle-shift conversion by Sequential Shift (for automatic).
